backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor that composes blob storage, authorization, user approval, sessions, materials, attendance, UPI payments, and Stripe functionality; exposes public query/update methods for admin and student operations.
backend/migration.mo: Defines OldActor and NewActor types and a `run` migration function that adds empty sessions, materials, and attendanceRecords maps with initial ID counters to the existing actor state.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (Manage Student Sessions, Manage Student Materials, Attendance Management) to their frontend files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing key fixes and responsibilities for pages, layouts, hooks, and components.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, sidebar, chart colors, etc.).
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React SPA titled 'The Rajat's Equation', setting favicon, viewport meta, and mounting the app via `/src/main.tsx`.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with the generated route tree, wraps the app in a light-mode ThemeProvider, and renders a Sonner Toaster.
frontend/src/components/LoadingSpinner.t: Simple animated spinner component with three size variants (sm, md, lg) rendered as a spinning bordered div.
frontend/src/components/NotificationBell: Popover notification bell component that filters and displays notifications for a given studentId, shows an unread badge count, and supports mark-all-read functionality.
frontend/src/components/ReceiptModal.tsx: A modal dialog component that displays a formatted payment receipt, showing student info, course details, session type, hours, rate, and UPI transaction ID.
frontend/src/components/StatCard.tsx: A styled card component for displaying a single statistic with a title, value, icon, optional subtitle, and one of four color themes.
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: A small inline badge component that renders a color-coded label for a given status value (pending, approved, rejected, etc.).
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppButton.t: A link button component that opens a pre-filled WhatsApp chat to a hardcoded phone number with a configurable message and label.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor, using the current Internet Identity and initializing admin access control when authenticated.
frontend/src/hooks/useAttendance.ts: React Query hooks for fetching attendance records and summary for a student, and a mutation hook for marking attendance via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login, logout, and identity state.
frontend/src/hooks/useMaterials.ts: React Query hooks for fetching, adding, and deleting study materials for a student via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSessions.ts: React Query hooks for fetching, adding, and deleting tutoring sessions for a student via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter font, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes.
frontend/src/layouts/AdminLayout.tsx: Defines the admin panel layout with a responsive sidebar navigation, logout functionality, and a badge showing pending payment count fetched via React Query.
frontend/src/layouts/RootLayout.tsx: Root layout component that initializes the localStorage store on mount and renders child routes via Outlet.
frontend/src/layouts/StudentLayout.tsx: Defines the student portal layout with a responsive sidebar navigation, unread notification count, and logout functionality.
frontend/src/lib/auth.ts: Provides utilities for storing, retrieving, and clearing authentication state (role, userId, email, token) in localStorage.
frontend/src/lib/store.ts: Implements a localStorage-based data store with TypeScript interfaces and default seed data for users, students, courses, sessions, materials, payments, and notifications.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports utility functions for merging Tailwind class names and formatting currency, dates, and datetimes for the Indian locale.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AttendanceManag: Admin page for marking and viewing student attendance per session, fetching approved students via payments and allowing the admin to select a student, session, and attendance status to submit.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Courses.tsx: Admin page for managing course offerings, supporting create, edit, delete, and active/inactive toggling of courses using local store utilities.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Dashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard displaying summary stats (students, courses, sessions, revenue) and alert cards for pending student approvals and payments sourced from the local store.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ManageStudentMa: Admin page for adding and deleting study materials for approved students, supporting both file upload and URL link modes with per-student material listing.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ManageStudentSe: Admin page for managing individual student sessions, allowing admins to select an approved student, add new sessions with date/time/meet link/topic, and delete existing sessions using React Query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Materials.tsx: Admin page for uploading and deleting course study materials, with course filtering, form validation, and notifications sent to enrolled students when new materials are added, using a local store.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Notifications.t: Admin page for composing and sending in-app notifications to all students or a specific student, with a history list of sent notifications stored in the local store.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Payments.tsx: Admin page for viewing payment records, approving or rejecting pending payments, displaying revenue summaries, and showing receipt modals, with status updates persisted to the local store.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Sessions.tsx: Admin page for viewing and editing existing sessions from the local store, supporting status filtering and updating a session's meet link and status, with notifications sent to students on status changes.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Students.tsx: Admin page for managing student registrations, allowing filtering/searching students by status, approving or rejecting registrations, and generating/copying access codes.
frontend/src/pages/Landing.tsx: Public landing page displaying a navbar, hero section, active courses list, and WhatsApp contact integration for the math tutoring service.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Login page supporting both admin (email/password) and student (email/access code) authentication with role-based routing on success.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailure.tsx: Static payment failure page displaying an error message with links to retry booking or return to the student dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccess.tsx: Displays a payment success confirmation page that processes any pending payment from sessionStorage, updates payment and session statuses in the store, and creates an admin notification.
frontend/src/pages/Register.tsx: Renders a student registration form with validation, checks for duplicate emails, and creates a new user and pending student record in the local store upon submission.
frontend/src/pages/student/Book.tsx: Multi-step session booking page for students to select a course, configure session type/hours/date/time, submit a UPI payment transaction ID, and create session and payment records.
frontend/src/pages/student/Courses.tsx: Displays a student's enrolled courses with pricing details and material counts, with a fallback prompt to contact WhatsApp if no courses are enrolled.
frontend/src/pages/student/Dashboard.tsx: Student dashboard showing upcoming sessions, recent materials, and attendance summary fetched via custom hooks, with status-based views for pending/rejected accounts.
frontend/src/pages/student/Materials.tsx: Study materials page for students that lists downloadable course files filtered by enrolled courses, with file-type icons and badges.
frontend/src/pages/student/MyMaterials.t: Student-facing page that fetches and displays study materials assigned to the student, supporting both file download and external link opening based on material type.
frontend/src/pages/student/MySessions.ts: Student-facing page that lists all sessions (sorted newest first) with their attendance status (present/absent/unmarked), fetched via hooks for sessions and attendance records.
frontend/src/pages/student/Payments.tsx: Student payment history page showing a summary of total paid, completed, and pending payments, with a list of individual payment cards and a receipt modal.
frontend/src/pages/student/Profile.tsx: Student profile page displaying and allowing inline editing of name and phone, showing account status badge and a copyable access code card for approved students.
frontend/src/pages/student/Sessions.tsx: Student sessions page with tabbed views for upcoming and past sessions, showing session details and a Join Google Meet button for scheduled sessions.
frontend/src/routeTree.ts: Defines the full TanStack Router route tree for the app, including public routes, admin routes (guarded by requireAdmin), and student routes (guarded by requireStudent), with role-based redirect guards.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom brand colors (navy, gold), CSS variable-based design tokens, container settings, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state including architecture notes, existing features (session management, materials, attendance, student dashboard), and known issues for a student management system on the Internet Computer.
